Multiply Match 🐸

A two-panel multiplication memory game. Pick two factor cards on the left, then find their product on the right. Wrong answers flip everything back — so memory matters!

How to play

  1. Click two number cards on the left panel (the factors).
  2. Click a product card on the right panel.
  3. If factor1 × factor2 = product — all three stay face-up (matched ✅).

  4. If wrong — the two factor cards and any previously revealed product card flip back face-down. Remember where they were!

  5. Match all pairs to win. 🎉

Levels

Level Pairs Factor cards Product cards
1 4 8 4
2 9 18 9
3 16 32 16
4 25 50 25

Complete a level to unlock the next one.
